No Poverty.reason: The course indirectly supports Target 1.4 (access to financial services) and 1.b (sound policy frameworks) through its focus on monetary policy, financial markets, and financial regulation.
evidence: 貨幣與金融市場 (money and financial markets)
貨幣政策 (monetary policy)
金融監理 (financial regulation)

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to zero hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to health, well-being, or related services.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly aims to 'cultivate necessary academic skills' and provide a 'solid foundation for economic analysis' (Target 4.4).
evidence: 本課程是一門中級經濟學課程 (This course is an intermediate economics course)
培養每個學生必要的學術技能 (cultivate each student necessary academic skills)
為經濟分析和思考奠定了堅實的基礎 (laid a solid foundation for economic analysis and thinking)

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course's core focus on 'macroeconomic performance' (Target 8.1) and strengthening 'financial institutions' to expand access to financial services (Target 8.10) provides explicit alignment.
evidence: 中央銀行的貨幣工具如何影響總體經濟的表現 (how monetary tools affect macroeconomic performance)
金融機構在貨幣政策傳導過程的角色 (role of financial institutions in the monetary policy transmission process)
金融監理 (financial regulation)

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course covers 'financial markets' and 'money supply process', which are crucial for providing access to financial services and credit for enterprises (Target 9.3).
evidence: 貨幣與金融市場 (money and financial markets)
貨幣供給過程 (money supply process)
貨幣政策的目標與工具 (monetary policy goals and tools)

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course directly addresses Target 10.5 ('improve the regulation... of global financial markets') through its focus on 'financial regulation' and policy effectiveness.
evidence: 金融監理 (financial regulation)
財政與貨幣政策有效性 (fiscal and monetary policy effectiveness)
國際金融如何影響到國家經濟 (how international finance affects the national economy)

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to urban development, housing, or infrastructure for communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to consumption patterns, waste management, or resource efficiency.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to climate change, mitigation, or adaptation.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or deforestation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course focuses on developing effective and accountable 'financial institutions' and 'Central Bank' systems through 'financial regulation', directly supporting Target 16.6.

中央銀行制度 (Central Bank system)
金融機構 (financial institutions)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course directly supports Target 17.13 ('Enhance global macroeconomic stability') by analyzing 'monetary policy', 'fiscal policy', and 'international finance' in an open economy context.
evidence: 開放經濟體的政策分析模型 (Open economy policy analysis model)
國際金融 (international finance)
總體經濟的表現 (macroeconomic performance)
